description:
Overview:

Application: This shake bottle can be used to blend the protein powder, also, it can be used as a regular water cup, meeting your different needs on different occasions.
Good performance: The rotating speed can be up to 7000rpm, this mixing bottle helps you make delicious food and drink, and is suitable for stirring coffee, milk, powder and others. The battery-operated design makes your use easier.
Automatic: The one-key control design makes it easy for you to operate the shaker bottle, the 380ml capacity is enough to meet your daily needs.
Waterproof: This kind of mixing cup works with IPX5 protection, the sealing design ensures a leak-proof ability, so you can use it without worries. You can carry it easily because it has a handle.
Reliable: This shake bottle is made of plastic, heat-resistant and durable, serving you for long-term use because it is not easy to break or damage. And you can wash it because it is detachable.


Product information:
Color: double Gear Power-cream white, double Gear Power-Peach Peach Pink, double Gear Power-New Branch Green
Material: Plastic
Structure: Single layer
Shape: round
Function: electric stirring
Capacity: 350ml


Packing list:
Mixing cup x1
